text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! ☆ Let's go to Funny Honey before the
race. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Regular honeyade's great, but I think I'll go for
some ice cream today! ♪
Aye, sis! One honeyade ice cream, please! ☆

text_block_list.name: Funny Honey Employee
text_block_list.text: Heeey, Helios! Is a single scoop good?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Just a single?! Talk about stingy!

text_block_list.name: Funny Honey Employee
text_block_list.text: A double, then?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh! ☆ Keep goin'!

text_block_list.name: Funny Honey Employee
text_block_list.text: Y-you're kidding...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'd never! Gimme that triple, sis! ★☆▲!
Don't you know what today is?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's the triple-lit Mejiro on Mejiro on Mejiro
race! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the Classics, the Kikuka Sho, has
turned out to be a battle between three Mejiro
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The first runner to make her entrance has been a
star throughout this year's Classics...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Mejiro Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey! Let's have a good race today!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Next up is one of this summer's rising stars, Mejiro
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's an honor to be here today.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And finally, we have the wild and free Mejiro
Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: W-waheee—I mean hello, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's all have a good race... or something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's coming across a bit ditzy, but still, she
seems a little more self-assertive than before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Palmer. Welcome to my domain.
Welcome to... the long-distances.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'm not here to step on your toes or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Don't tell me you're going to hold back. By
all means, unleash all you've got on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, you were always the
one cooling my temper when we were younger as I
let my passion carry me away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well... That was sort of my job and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It did seem that way. However... I won't allow that
to happen today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I desire to bring home the glory on behalf of the
Mejiro name. Go ahead and try to stop me if you
think you can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you truly believe you can leash this passion of
mine, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Oh man... Butting heads with her might be a little too much... But...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just don't think about it. I can handle this at my
own pace. Yeah, that's right!
